title: Tara Tarini Temple
tagline: Tara Tarini Temple — spiritual town of Odisha

overview.short: Tara Tarini Pitha (ତାରାତାରିଣୀ ପୀଠ) is a Hindu temple of Adi Shakti and one of the Adi Shakti Pithas, at the Kumari hills on the bank of Rushikulya river near Purushottampur in Ganj
overview.description: Tara Tarini Pitha (ତାରାତାରିଣୀ ପୀଠ) is a Hindu temple of Adi Shakti and one of the Adi Shakti Pithas, at the Kumari hills on the bank of Rushikulya river near Purushottampur in Ganjam district of Odisha, around 28 km from Brahmapur city.

topPlaces.name: Achuli
topPlaces.description: Achuli is a village in Purushottampur block, Ganjam District, Odisha, India. Its village code is 118336.

topPlaces.name: Alladigam
topPlaces.description: Alladigam (also spelled Aladigam, Alladigaon and Aladigan) is a village in Ganjam District in the Indian state of Odisha.

topPlaces.name: Ranjhalli
topPlaces.description: Ranjhalli is a village panchayat near the river bank of Rushikulya and located at heart of the Ganjam district. It has population of nearly about 2,400 with 700 families (as per the 2011 census).

topPlaces.name: Purusottampur
topPlaces.description: Purusottampur (also spelt as Purushottampur) is a town and a Notified Area Council in Ganjam district in the Indian state of Odisha.

topPlaces.name: Bilaspur, Ganjam
topPlaces.description: Bilaspur is a small village located in the Khalikote block of Ganjam District, Odisha India. It comes under Khalikote legislative assembly and Aska Lok Sabha seat.

topPlaces.name: Jaugada
topPlaces.description: Jaugada ("Jaugarh", ancient Samapa) is a ruined fortress in the Ganjam district in Odisha, India. Jaugada lies 35 km north-west of Brahmapur and 160 km south-west of Bhubaneshwar.

topPlaces.name: Kanaka Durga, Raulapalli
topPlaces.description: The Kanaka Durga temple is dedicated to Goddess Mahishamardini and located in Raulapalli village on a small hillock. On the basis of architecture and local inscriptions the temple was renovated on the early 19th century after the old one was damaged.

topPlaces.name: Pandia, Odisha
topPlaces.description: Pandia is a village in Purushottampur block, Ganjam district, Odisha, India.

items.note: Achuli is a village in Purushottampur block, Ganjam District, Odisha, India. Its village code is 118336.
Alladigam (also spelled Aladigam, Alladigaon and Aladigan) is a village in Ganjam District in the Indian state of Odisha.
Ranjhalli is a village panchayat near the river bank of Rushikulya and located at heart of the Ganjam district. It has population of nearly about 2,400 with 700 families (as per the 2011 census).
Purusottampur (also spelt as Purushottampur) is a town and a Notified Area Council in Ganjam district in the Indian state of Odisha.
Bilaspur is a small village located in the Khalikote block of Ganjam District, Odisha India. It comes under Khalikote legislative assembly and Aska Lok Sabha seat.
Jaugada ("Jaugarh", ancient Samapa) is a ruined fortress in the Ganjam district in Odisha, India. Jaugada lies 35 km north-west of Brahmapur and 160 km south-west of Bhubaneshwar.

The Kanaka Durga temple is dedicated to Goddess Mahishamardini and located in Raulapalli village on a small hillock. On the basis of architecture and local inscriptions the temple was renovated on the early 19th century after the old one was damaged.
Pandia is a village in Purushottampur block, Ganjam district, Odisha, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Tara Tarini Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Tara Tarini Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Tara Tarini Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Biju Patnaik International Airport, Bhubaneswar (128 km) and the nearest railway station is Puri Railway Station (103 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Tara Tarini Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Tara Tarini Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Tara Tarini Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Tara Tarini Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Tara Tarini Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Achuli, Alladigam, Ranjhalli, Purusottampur, Bilaspur, Ganjam.
